case_number: Crl. Misc. Application No. S-485 of 2022

chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No. S-485 of 2022 (Mst. Gulzar Khatoon Vs. The State ) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 18-10-2023. Mr. Shahid Ali Memon advocate for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional P.G for the State. *********-------------******** It is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that learned trial Court while recording acquittal of accused Abdul Qayyum and Mst. Muneeran by way of compromise ordered them to deposit the Diyat money under share of minors to be invested in some profitable scheme, which they did. Subsequently, the applicant being mother of the minors by making an application, sought for withdrawal of the profit on Diyat money so deposited on behalf of the minors to meet with their expenses, which was denied by learned trial Court vide order dated 11-08-2022. By contending so, he sought for direction against learned trial Court to allow the applicant to withdraw the profit on Diyat money so deposited on behalf of minors with learned trial Curt till they attained majority in order to meet with their expenses, which is not opposed by learned APG for the State. In view of above the impugned order is modified only to the extent that the applicant may withdraw the profit on Diyat money so deposited with learned trial Court on behalf of minors in accordance with law and then to utilize the same for their welfare till the time they attained majority. The instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
